positive: A vibrant, abstract celestial forest scene viewed from above, featuring oversized, stylized bioluminescent flora and fauna, including floating geometric islands and glowing crystalline mushrooms. The primary colors should be deep sapphire blues, electric teals, and luminous magenta accents, creating a contrast with deep velvet black negative space. The composition must be highly symmetrical and centered, utilizing clean, sharp silhouettes against a gradient cosmic background. The style should be a modern graphic pop art fusion with neo-art nouveau botanical elements, emphasizing strong, clean linework and high saturation for optimal screen printing on fabric. Minimal gradient use, favoring flat, impactful color blocks and clean edges.
